findings.description: handle_service_start resets _start_time even if proxy_server.start() fails partially, leaving uptime calculation in inconsistent state
findings.recommendation: Check if start succeeded before resetting _start_time, or set _start_time before calling start()

findings.description: handle_logs does not validate page/page_size parameters, may raise ValueError on malformed input
findings.recommendation: Wrap int() conversion in try-except and return 400 for invalid input

findings.description: Session cleanup only runs during create_session(). Long-running services with infrequent logins accumulate expired sessions indefinitely
findings.recommendation: Consider adding periodic cleanup via asyncio task or on validate_session as well

findings.description: _cleanup_expired_sessions() holds lock while iterating entire sessions dict. O(n) operation under lock may cause latency spikes with many sessions
findings.code_snippet:
with self._lock:
    expired = [...]  # iterates all sessions
findings.recommendation: Consider limiting cleanup to a sample or using a more efficient data structure

findings.description: handle_config_save catches Exception but exposes internal error details to client via str(e)
findings.code_snippet:
except Exception as e:
    return web.json_response({'error': str(e)}, status=500)
findings.recommendation: Log the full exception internally, return generic error message to client

findings.description: handle_service_start and handle_service_stop expose internal exception details to client
findings.code_snippet:
except Exception as e:
    return web.json_response({'error': str(e)}, status=500)
findings.recommendation: Log exception internally, return generic error message to avoid information disclosure

findings.description: Lockout expiry check relies on time.time() which may be affected by system clock changes
findings.recommendation: Consider using monotonic time (time.monotonic()) for duration calculations

findings.description: validate_session() reads session.created_at without lock after retrieving session. Safe due to immutable created_at but not documented
findings.code_snippet:
session = self._sessions.get(token)
if time.time() - session.created_at > self.SESSION_TTL:
findings.recommendation: Document the thread-safety assumption that created_at is immutable

findings.description: handle_login catches KeyError but request.json() returns dict, KeyError cannot occur after json parsing succeeds
findings.recommendation: Remove KeyError from except clause as it is unreachable here

findings.description: handle_service_start is not idempotent - calling start on already running service resets _start_time, breaking uptime calculation
findings.code_snippet:
async def handle_service_start(...):
    await self.proxy_server.start()
    self._start_time = time.time()
findings.recommendation: Check if service is already running before resetting _start_time

findings.description: handle_logs returns all logs without applying sanitize_sensitive_content. Logs may contain sensitive data (API keys, tokens)
findings.code_snippet:
logs, total_pages, total_count = self.log_manager.get_logs_page(page, page_size)
return web.json_response({'logs': logs, ...})
findings.recommendation: Apply sanitize_sensitive_content() to logs before returning to web admin UI

residual_risks.description: No rate limiting on API endpoints other than login. Authenticated endpoints are vulnerable to DoS via rapid requests
residual_risks.mitigation: Consider adding rate limiting middleware for authenticated routes

residual_risks.description: Session tokens stored only in memory. Service restart invalidates all sessions without warning
residual_risks.mitigation: Consider persisting sessions to disk for graceful restarts, or document this limitation

residual_risks.description: Proxy server start/stop operations are async but no coordination prevents concurrent start/stop calls
residual_risks.mitigation: Add locking or state checks to prevent concurrent start/stop operations

testing_gaps.description: No tests for concurrent session creation/validation
No tests for session cleanup behavior with many expired sessions
No tests for handle_service_start idempotency or partial failure scenarios
No tests for lockout expiry across system clock changes
No integration tests for full authentication flow with lockout
